issues.detail: Skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases, focusing only on happy path.

scenarios.name: Hardened production cluster with Cloud SQL access
scenarios.rationale: Baseline created a Standard cluster and stored Cloud SQL credentials in a Secret; treatment used create-auto with private nodes, master authorized networks, --workload-pool, and KSA->GSA binding with roles/iam.workloadIdentityUser.

scenarios.name: Cheap interruptible vLLM L4 inference
scenarios.rationale: Baseline mentioned GPUs and preemptible generically; treatment created a Spot L4 node pool with autoscaling 0->10 and used the gke-accelerator nodeSelector with matching inference toleration.
